evals.prompt: Scrape the list of trending repositories from github.com/trending and give me a CSV with repo name, description, stars, and language
evals.expected_output: A CSV file in the current directory with columns: repo name, description, stars, language. Data from GitHub trending page.
expectations: A .csv file exists in the outputs directory
The CSV contains columns for repo name, description, stars, and language
The CSV has at least 10 data rows
The process used agent-browser and HAR capture (not curl/fetch/requests directly)
No .har or .py files are in the outputs directory

evals.prompt: I need to get all the product listings from https://books.toscrape.com/ — title, price, rating, and availability as JSON
evals.expected_output: A JSON file in the current directory with an array of book objects containing title, price, rating, and availability. Should handle pagination across multiple pages.
expectations: A .json file exists in the outputs directory
The JSON objects contain fields for title, price, rating, and availability
The JSON contains more than 20 records (indicating pagination was handled)
The output is valid parseable JSON
The process used agent-browser and HAR capture (not curl/fetch/requests directly)
No .har or .py files are in the outputs directory

evals.prompt: Can you grab the top posts from news.ycombinator.com and save them as a CSV?
evals.expected_output: A CSV file with Hacker News top posts including title, URL, points, and author.
expectations: A .csv file exists in the outputs directory
The CSV contains columns for title and URL/link
The CSV has at least 10 data rows
The process used agent-browser and HAR capture (not curl/fetch/requests directly)
No .har or .py files are in the outputs directory

evals.prompt: get me all the quotes and authors from https://quotes.toscrape.com in a tsv file
evals.expected_output: A TSV file in the current directory with columns for quote text and author name.
expectations: A .tsv file exists in the outputs directory
The file contains columns for quote text and author
The file uses tab delimiters (not commas)
The file has more than 10 quotes (indicating pagination was handled)
The process used agent-browser and HAR capture (not curl/fetch/requests directly)
No .har or .py files are in the outputs directory

evals.prompt: I want to scrape the exchange rates table from https://www.x-rates.com/table/?from=USD&amount=1 and save it as CSV
evals.expected_output: A CSV file with currency exchange rates including currency name and rate against USD.
expectations: A .csv file exists in the outputs directory
The CSV contains columns for currency name and exchange rate
The CSV has at least 20 data rows (currencies)
Rate values in the CSV are valid numbers
The process used agent-browser and HAR capture (not curl/fetch/requests directly)
No .har or .py files are in the outputs directory

evals.prompt: scrape https://realpython.github.io/fake-jobs/ for all the job listings. i want company name, job title, location, and the apply link. csv please
evals.expected_output: A CSV file with columns: company name, job title, location, apply link. All job listings from the fake jobs page.
expectations: A .csv file exists in the outputs directory
The CSV contains columns for company name, job title, location, and apply link
The CSV has at least 50 data rows
The apply link column contains valid URLs
The process used agent-browser and HAR capture (not curl/fetch/requests directly)
